creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Hi, Thanks for this update.

The p5-Image-ExifTool port is tracking what the author calls "production versions" of the software.

The current "production version" of p5-Image-ExifTool is 11.11

Version 11.27 is considered a "development version" so this update should be made to the p5-Image-ExifTool-devel port instead.

If you want to submit a patch to update p5-Image-ExifTool to 11.11 that would be great; otherwise I will get to it in the next few days.

Thanks and sorry for any confusion.
